title: astraea gracilis
intro: Astraea gracilis, also known as the 'Moonstone', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Astraea gracilis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate stress and anxiety. Astraea gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its benefits.
